title: Wintery Atmosphere
description: Adds snow particles falling from snow blocks and powder snow blocks when there's air or transparent blocks underneath.
body:
![snowflakes falling from snow block at a cave entrance](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e46aa56e6f3499383354eb0f138d7b31ac729faa_0.webp)

# Wintery Atmosphere - Falling Snowflakes
---

Just a simple client-side mod that adds some life to snowy biomes. It spawns falling snow particles under Snow Blocks and Powdered Snow if there is air underneath them.

It’s purely visual, but it makes overhangs, cliffs, and floating islands look a bit less static.

## Features
- Snow Drip: Particles fall from snow blocks when they are above air.

## Dependencies
- Fabric API

## Compatibility

Works with 1.21.x (Fabric).
